---
title: "Startup Ideas"
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-section">
  <p class="page-intro">
    Ideas I'm exploring, validating, or excited about. Some may become real companies — some are just thinking out loud.
  </p>

  <div class="startup-list">

    <!-- ============================================================
         STARTUP IDEA CARD — copy this block for each idea
         ============================================================ -->
    <div class="startup-card">
      <div class="startup-card-left">
        <div class="startup-emoji">[Emoji]</div>
        <div class="startup-stage exploring">Exploring</div>
        <!-- Stage options: exploring | validating | building | launched | paused -->
      </div>
      <div class="startup-card-right">
        <h3 class="startup-title">[Idea / Company Name]</h3>
        <p class="startup-tagline">[One-liner: "X for Y" or "We help Z do W"]</p>
        <div class="startup-section">
          <strong>Problem</strong>
          <p>[What problem does this solve? Who feels this pain?]</p>
        </div>
        <div class="startup-section">
          <strong>Solution</strong>
          <p>[How do you solve it? What's the core insight?]</p>
        </div>
        <div class="startup-section">
          <strong>Why now?</strong>
          <p>[What has changed in the market or technology that makes this the right time?]</p>
        </div>
        <div class="startup-tags">
          <span class="tag">[Industry]</span>
          <span class="tag">[Technology]</span>
          <span class="tag">[Market]</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ============================================================
         STARTUP IDEA 2
         ============================================================ -->
    <div class="startup-card">
      <div class="startup-card-left">
        <div class="startup-emoji">[Emoji]</div>
        <div class="startup-stage validating">Validating</div>
      </div>
      <div class="startup-card-right">
        <h3 class="startup-title">[Idea / Company Name]</h3>
        <p class="startup-tagline">[One-liner]</p>
        <div class="startup-section">
          <strong>Problem</strong>
          <p>[Problem description]</p>
        </div>
        <div class="startup-section">
          <strong>Solution</strong>
          <p>[Solution description]</p>
        </div>
        <div class="startup-tags">
          <span class="tag">[Industry]</span>
          <span class="tag">[Technology]</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Add more startup-card blocks as needed -->

  </div>
</div>
```
